case_title: MILLER, CHARLES VS RIEDY, DODGE IND/DBA RIEDY`S RACING ENGINES.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIEDY, DODGE IND/DBA RIEDY`S RACING ENGINES. $1,575.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,601.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $500.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT RIEDY, DODGE IND/DBA RIEDY`S RACING ENGINES.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RIEDY, DODGE IND/DBA RIEDY`S RACING ENGINES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,575.00 FILED BY MILLER, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT RIEDY, DODGE IND/DBA RIEDY`S RACING ENGINES. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DODGE RIEDY -RIEDY'S RACING ENG. RETURNED SIGNED;
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $287.84 AS TO DEFENDANT RIEDY, DODGE IND/DBA RIEDY`S RACING ENGINES.
